title: Hycote Fast Drying Aerosol Car Spray Paint, Gloss Black, 400 ml
features: • Excellent resistance to colour durability and colour fade
description: From the manufacturer Dedicated in researching on Car Aerosol Spray Paint Our state-of-the-art technical center researches coating technologies and houses coating test equipment, including accelerated weathering and corrosion testing. This enables us to develop and launch innovative Hycote-branded products that deliver professional results with superior coverage, extreme durability, and super-fast drying with no runs or drips. The Aerosol Spray Paint for you Using compressed consol technology, Hycote paints offer up to double the coverage of conventional spray paint cans with less packaging. Tested at Hycote’s state-of-the-art technical research center to ensure super-fast drying, extreme durability, and excellent adhesion to primed surfaces. More that just a Car Paint Hycote Spray Paint is a premium spray paint with fast drying and exceptional durability, adhesion, and smoothness. For use with wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic. Proud to be British With its base in Greater Manchester, James Briggs Limited is one of the leading aerosol and touch-up paints manufacturers in the UK and Europe.
